description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa features three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all of which appear to be uniform in size and thickness. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and providing a clean, boxy silhouette. The upholstery is a solid, smooth fabric in a dark gray color, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. The legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design that enhances the sofa's contemporary look. This piece is designed for comfort and spacious seating, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in dark gray with broad armrests, loose cushions, and a chaise lounge extension. The design is sleek, boxy, and upholstered in smooth, solid fabric.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, three seat cushions, and the chaise lounge extension on the right.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise lounge end, highlighting the depth of the seat and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the armrests and back cushions.
description_view_3: Side view from the main sofa end, showing the armrest and the alignment of the seat and back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all uniform in size, with a sectional layout including a chaise lounge extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a clean, boxy profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed leg design, likely positioned at the corners and possibly along the central support for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with three loose, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric upholstery in a dark gray color with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
